title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: Satellite 6 Client Bug Fix Update
overview: An update for Satellite is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Red Hat Satellite is a system management solution that allows organizations toconfigure and maintain their systems without the necessity to provide publicInternet access to their servers or other client systems. It performsprovisioning and configuration management of predefined standard operatingenvironments.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 - Extended Update Support 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian - Extended Update Support
Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server for Power LE - Update Services for SAP Solutions

fixes.description: Additional blank spaces and quotes in /etc/foreman_scap_client/config.yaml can break bash execution of foreman_scap_client binary

full_text:
An update for Satellite is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Satellite is a system management solution that allows organizations toconfigure and maintain their systems without the necessity to provide publicInternet access to their servers or other client systems. It performsprovisioning and configuration management of predefined standard operatingenvironments.
